fields.name: imageSize
fields.description: Full firmware image size in bytes.

fields.name: verifyType
fields.description: Object-level verification algorithm such as md5, crc32 or sha256.

fields.name: verifyValue
fields.description: Hex verification value for the full firmware image.

fields.name: chunkSizeHint
fields.description: Preferred STREAM chunk size in bytes.

fields.name: flags
fields.description: OTA behavior flags such as resume or force-update hints.

fields.name: acceptedOffset
fields.description: First byte offset the sender should transmit.

fields.name: chunkSize
fields.description: Negotiated STREAM chunk size in bytes.

fields.name: cursorUnit
fields.description: Cursor unit used by STREAM packets, usually byteOffset.

fields.name: maxDataSize
fields.description: Maximum STREAM data bytes per packet.

fields.name: totalBytesSent
fields.description: Total firmware bytes sent by the host.

fields.name: totalChunks
fields.description: Total STREAM chunks sent by the host.

fields.name: receivedBytes
fields.description: Total bytes accepted by the device.

fields.name: receivedChunks
fields.description: Total chunks accepted by the device.

fields.name: verifyResult
fields.description: Verification result for the transferred image.

fields.name: applyMode
fields.description: Apply mode such as APPLY_NOW, APPLY_ON_REBOOT or STAGE_ONLY.

fields.name: rebootRequired
fields.description: Whether applying the image requires reboot.

fields.name: transportProfile
fields.description: Supported HID Transport Profile, usually AXTP-USB-HID.

fields.name: maxChunkSize
fields.description: Maximum STREAM data bytes per Standard Frame after the 16B STREAM header.

fields.name: supportsVideo
fields.description: Device can open media.video streams over HID.

fields.name: supportsAudio
fields.description: Device can open media.audio streams over HID.

fields.name: configSchemaVersion
fields.description: Version of the audio algorithm configuration schema exposed by the device.

fields.name: updatePolicy
fields.description: Update and atomicity policy for set and reset operations.

fields.name: supportedAlgorithms
fields.description: Optional compact list of supported algorithm object names; JSON implementations expose names as an array of strings.

schemas.name: AudioGetAlgorithmCapabilitiesRequest
schemas.description: Optional selector for querying audio algorithm capabilities.

fields.name: items
fields.description: Optional JSON array of algorithm object names; omit to query all supported algorithms.

schemas.name: AudioGetAlgorithmConfigRequest
schemas.description: Optional selector for querying current audio algorithm configuration.

fields.name: items
fields.description: Optional JSON array of algorithm object names; omit to query all supported algorithms.

fields.name: config
fields.description: Partial configuration keyed by algorithm object name.

schemas.name: AudioResetAlgorithmConfigRequest
schemas.description: Selector for resetting audio algorithm configuration to defaults.

fields.name: items
fields.description: JSON reset selector: the string all, an array of algorithm object names, or a map from algorithm names to field-name arrays.

schemas.name: AudioSetAlgorithmConfigResponse
schemas.description: Result of a successful set or reset operation.

fields.name: applyState
fields.description: Apply state; values are applied or pending_restart.

fields.name: requiresAudioRestart
fields.description: Whether the change requires restarting the audio link or rebuilding the audio pipeline.

fields.name: config
fields.description: Final effective configuration for the algorithms affected by this operation.

schemas.name: AudioAlgorithmConfigChangedEvent
schemas.description: Payload emitted when audio algorithm configuration changes.

fields.name: reason
fields.description: Change reason; values include user_request, reset_to_default, factory_reset, profile_changed, device_policy, restore_config, and unknown.

fields.name: applyState
fields.description: Apply state; values are applied or pending_restart.

fields.name: requiresAudioRestart
fields.description: Whether the change requires restarting the audio link or rebuilding the audio pipeline.

fields.name: config
fields.description: Changed or affected algorithm configuration values.

fields.name: changedFields
fields.description: Optional JSON array of changed field paths such as noiseSuppression.level.

schemas.name: AudioGetAlgorithmCapabilitiesResponse
schemas.description: Supported algorithm objects, fields, defaults, ranges, units, and update policy.

fields.name: updatePolicy
fields.description: Update and atomicity policy for set and reset operations.

fields.name: algorithms
fields.description: Capability descriptors keyed by algorithm object name.

schemas.name: AudioAlgorithmUpdatePolicy
schemas.description: Audio algorithm update and atomicity policy.

fields.name: partialUpdateSupported
fields.description: Whether clients may send only the fields they want to modify.

fields.name: multiAlgorithmUpdateSupported
fields.description: Whether one request may update multiple algorithm objects.

fields.name: atomicUpdateSupported
fields.description: Whether set and reset operations are applied atomically.

schemas.name: AudioAlgorithmCapabilities
schemas.description: Capability descriptors for audio algorithm objects.

schemas.name: AudioAlgorithmPropertyCapability
schemas.description: Descriptor for one algorithm configuration property.

fields.name: type
fields.description: Property type; values include boolean, enum, uint8, uint16, uint32, int32, float, string, object, and array.

fields.name: defaultBool
fields.description: Boolean default value when type is boolean.

fields.name: defaultEnum
fields.description: Enum default value when type is enum.

fields.name: defaultInt32
fields.description: Numeric default value for integer-backed properties.

fields.name: values
fields.description: Optional JSON array of enum values.

fields.name: unit
fields.description: Unit such as ms, dB, or degree.

fields.name: requiresAudioRestart
fields.description: Whether modifying this field requires restarting the audio link or rebuilding the audio pipeline.

schemas.name: AudioAlgorithmConfig
schemas.description: Audio algorithm configuration keyed by algorithm object name.

fields.name: tailLengthMs
fields.description: Echo tail length in milliseconds; modifying it may require restarting the audio link.

fields.name: enabled
fields.description: Whether automatic gain control is enabled.

fields.name: lookDirectionDeg
fields.description: Fixed beam look direction in degrees.

fields.name: enabled
fields.description: Whether voice activity detection is enabled.

fields.name: enabled
fields.description: Whether direction of arrival estimation is enabled.

fields.name: reportingEnabled
fields.description: Whether DOA or beam result reporting is enabled by this configuration.

schemas.name: NetworkGetApInfoRequest
schemas.description: Empty request for querying the device-hosted SoftAP information.

fields.name: enabled
fields.description: Whether the device-hosted SoftAP is currently enabled.

fields.name: ssid
fields.description: SoftAP SSID advertised by the device.

fields.name: bssid
fields.description: SoftAP BSSID or MAC address in colon-separated form.

fields.name: band
fields.description: SoftAP radio band, such as 2.4GHz, 5GHz or 6GHz.

fields.name: channel
fields.description: Wi-Fi channel used by the SoftAP.

fields.name: security
fields.description: SoftAP security mode, such as open, wpa2_psk or wpa3_sae.

fields.name: ipAddress
fields.description: IPv4 or IPv6 address assigned to the device on the SoftAP interface.

fields.name: clientCount
fields.description: Number of clients currently associated with the SoftAP.

schemas.name: NetworkApInfoChangedEvent
schemas.description: Payload emitted when SoftAP information changes.

fields.name: enabled
fields.description: Whether the device-hosted SoftAP is currently enabled.

fields.name: ssid
fields.description: SoftAP SSID advertised by the device.

fields.name: bssid
fields.description: SoftAP BSSID or MAC address in colon-separated form.

fields.name: band
fields.description: SoftAP radio band, such as 2.4GHz, 5GHz or 6GHz.

fields.name: channel
fields.description: Wi-Fi channel used by the SoftAP.

fields.name: security
fields.description: SoftAP security mode, such as open, wpa2_psk or wpa3_sae.

fields.name: ipAddress
fields.description: IPv4 or IPv6 address assigned to the device on the SoftAP interface.

fields.name: clientCount
fields.description: Number of clients currently associated with the SoftAP.

schemas.name: StreamOpenRequest
schemas.description: Parameters for opening a HID-backed media STREAM channel.

fields.name: profile
fields.description: Stream Profile name. For this method use media.video or media.audio.

fields.name: transportProfile
fields.description: Transport Profile name. HID media streams use AXTP-USB-HID.

fields.name: direction
fields.description: Stream direction; values are device_to_host, host_to_device, or bidirectional.

fields.name: mediaKind
fields.description: Media kind carried by this stream; values are video or audio.

fields.name: codec
fields.description: Codec or sample format, for example h264, mjpeg, pcm_s16le, or opus.

fields.name: width
fields.description: Video width in pixels. Required for video streams when not implied by sourceId.

fields.name: height
fields.description: Video height in pixels. Required for video streams when not implied by sourceId.

fields.name: frameRate
fields.description: Video frame rate in frames per second.

fields.name: chunkSizeHint
fields.description: Preferred STREAM data bytes per Standard Frame after the 16B STREAM header.

fields.name: windowSizeHint
fields.description: Preferred stream flow-control window in chunks.

schemas.name: StreamOpenResponse
schemas.description: Result of a successful STREAM media channel open.

fields.name: streamId
fields.description: STREAM channel identifier bound to the selected Stream Profile.

fields.name: chunkSize
fields.description: STREAM data bytes to place in each Standard Frame after the 16B STREAM header.

fields.name: windowSize
fields.description: Negotiated stream flow-control window in chunks.

fields.name: ackMode
fields.description: Stream acknowledgement mode, such as best_effort or stop_and_wait.

fields.name: cursorUnit
fields.description: Cursor unit used in the 64-bit STREAM cursor, usually timestampUs for media streams.

schemas.name: StreamOpenedEvent
schemas.description: Payload emitted when a STREAM media channel is opened.

fields.name: mediaKind
fields.description: Media kind carried by the stream; values are video or audio.

schemas.name: StreamErrorEvent
schemas.description: Payload emitted when a STREAM media channel fails.

fields.name: streamId
fields.description: STREAM channel identifier, absent if the failure happened before allocation.

fields.name: errorCode
fields.description: AXTP ErrorCode value describing the stream failure.
